{{Infobox religious building
| name = Tsumatsuhimeno Shrine
| native_name = 都麻都比売神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Tsumatsuhimeno Shrine'''|都麻都比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kii Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tsumatsuhimeno Shrine'''|都麻都比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kii Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tsumatsuhimeno Shrine'''|都麻都比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kii Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Tsumatsuhimeno Shrine'''|都麻都比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kii Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tsumatsuhimeno Shrine'''|都麻都比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kii Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tsumatsuhimeno Shrine'''|都麻都比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kii Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tsumatsuhimeno Shrine'''|都麻都比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kii Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tsumatsuhimeno Shrine'''|都麻都比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kii Province]].
